themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "God commands Israel to establish cities of refuge, fulfilling instructions given through Mose...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַמִּקְלָ֔ט: of refuge - an asylum (as a receptacle)".

6: He shall live in that city until he has stood...

themes.label: Judgment
themes.summary: This chapter addresses wrath, judgment, condemnation, justice, or divine reckoning. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "What modern applications exist for treating sojourners and foreigners with equal justice?". Cross references echo "Judgment".
